inputs.label: Ingredient Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw ingredients per kilogram

inputs.label: Ingredient Usage per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Amount of raw ingredient used per product unit in grams

inputs.label: Packaging Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of packaging materials per product unit

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in a batch

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost for producing one batch

inputs.label: Overhead Cost per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Allocated overhead costs (utilities, rent, etc.) per batch

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin percentage on selling price

formulas.profitPerUnit: (((ingredientCostPerKg * ingredientUsageGramsPerUnit / 1000) + packagingCostPerUnit + ((laborCostPerBatch + overheadCostPerBatch) / batchSize)) / (1 - profitMarginPercent / 100)) - ((ingredientCostPerKg * ingredientUsageGramsPerUnit / 1000) + packagingCostPerUnit + ((laborCostPerBatch + overheadCostPerBatch) / batchSize))
